name: local_network_fetcher
description: Fetches data from local network devices (like HomeAssistant, smart devices, or local APIs). Will reject non-local IP addresses to maintain privacy.

ip_address.description: The local IP address or hostname to query (e.g., 192.168.1.100, localhost).

path.description: The API path to append to the IP (e.g., /api/status).
